'''wonakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:klugy|klugy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:klugy|klugy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wonakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonakithi|wonakithi]] || [[word:wonakiji|wonakiji]] || [[word:wonakishi|wonakishi]] || [[word:wonakiki|wonakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonakuthuthu|wonakuthuthu]] || [[word:wonakujuju|wonakujuju]] || [[word:wonakushushu|wonakushushu]] || [[word:wonakukuku|wonakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonakuthu|wonakuthu]] || [[word:wonakuju|wonakuju]] || [[word:wonakushu|wonakushu]] || [[word:wonakuku|wonakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonakufthuf|wonakufthuf]] || [[word:wonakufjuf|wonakufjuf]] || [[word:wonakufshuf|wonakufshuf]] || [[word:wonakufkuf|wonakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonakethe|wonakethe]] || [[word:wonakeje|wonakeje]] || [[word:wonakeshe|wonakeshe]] || [[word:wonakeke|wonakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonakothotho|wonakothotho]] || [[word:wonakojojo|wonakojojo]] || [[word:wonakoshosho|wonakoshosho]] || [[word:wonakokoko|wonakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonakotho|wonakotho]] || [[word:wonakojo|wonakojo]] || [[word:wonakosho|wonakosho]] || [[word:wonakoko|wonakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonakofthof|wonakofthof]] || [[word:wonakofjof|wonakofjof]] || [[word:wonakofshof|wonakofshof]] || [[word:wonakofkof|wonakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfthÃŸf|wonakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfjÃŸf|wonakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfshÃŸf|wonakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfkÃŸf|wonakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wonakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wonakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wonakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wonakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfthÃŸf|wonakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfjÃŸf|wonakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfshÃŸf|wonakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfkÃŸf|wonakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfthÃŸf|wonakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfjÃŸf|wonakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfshÃŸf|wonakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonakÃŸfkÃŸf|wonakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonakÃḊthÃḊ|wonakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wonakÃḊjÃḊ|wonakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wonakÃḊshÃḊ|wonakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wonakÃḊkÃḊ|wonakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonakathatha|wonakathatha]] || [[word:wonakajaja|wonakajaja]] || [[word:wonakashasha|wonakashasha]] || [[word:wonakakaka|wonakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonakatha|wonakatha]] || [[word:wonakaja|wonakaja]] || [[word:wonakasha|wonakasha]] || [[word:wonakaka|wonakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonakafthaf|wonakafthaf]] || [[word:wonakafjaf|wonakafjaf]] || [[word:wonakafshaf|wonakafshaf]] || [[word:wonakafkaf|wonakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wonakasha|wonakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wonakshÃḋsha|wonakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wonakrosha|wonakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wonakmusha|wonakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wonakyasha|wonakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowonaknkshÃḋsha|gowonaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowonaknkrosha|gowonaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowonaknkmusha|gowonaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowonaknkyasha|gowonaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wonanakasha|wonanakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wonanakshÃḋsha|wonanakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wonanakrosha|wonanakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wonanakmusha|wonanakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wonanakyasha|wonanakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowonanaknkshÃḋsha|gowonanaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowonanaknkrosha|gowonanaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowonanaknkmusha|gowonanaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowonanaknkyasha|gowonanaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wenÃḊkasha|wenÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wenÃḊkshÃḋsha|wenÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wenÃḊkrosha|wenÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wenÃḊkmusha|wenÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wenÃḊkyasha|wenÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowenÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gowenÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowenÃḊknkrosha|gowenÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowenÃḊknkmusha|gowenÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowenÃḊknkyasha|gowenÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wonfakasha|wonfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wonfakshÃḋsha|wonfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wonfakrosha|wonfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wonfakmusha|wonfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wonfakyasha|wonfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowonfaknkshÃḋsha|gowonfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowonfaknkrosha|gowonfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowonfaknkmusha|gowonfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowonfaknkyasha|gowonfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
